ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read and write Exchange Online RBAC configuration [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your organization's Exchange Online service, without a signed-in user. This includes reading, creating, updating, and deleting Exchange management role definitions, role groups, role group membership, role assignments, management scopes, and role assignment policies.
Read and write Exchange Online RBAC configuration [on] Microsoft Graph
